bugs.description: Uses `'error' in response` to narrow to SuccessResponse, but PendingResponse also lacks an `error` field. The cast to SuccessResponse<T> succeeds at compile time but `response.data` is undefined for PendingResponse at runtime. Should use `response.status === 'success'` as the discriminant.

Accesses `response.metadata.cached` without checking whether the optional `metadata` field is defined. TypeScript types `metadata` as `{ cached: boolean; ttl: number } | undefined`, so this throws at runtime when metadata is absent. Should use optional chaining: `response.metadata?.cached ?? false`.
